response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned generalist software engineer with 15+ years of experience and some timely exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflows in his current Stripe role, but this role demands 8+ years of production AI/GenAI delivery — a bar he falls well short of. Critical disqualifiers include no Python in his skill set (a primary required language), no demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI, and GenAI work that appears to have begun only in April 2025. His data pipeline and TypeScript/cloud experience are genuine positives, but they do not offset the depth of AI-specific experience the role requires.
strengths: Current Stripe role directly touches MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, showing timely alignment with the role's technical focus
Proven TypeScript and AWS CDK experience at Shopify with data pipelines operating at scale
Staff-level seniority across multiple organisations demonstrating broad systems thinking and some mentorship history
concerns: Python is entirely absent from his listed skills despite being a primary required language for production AI work
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks anywhere in the resume
AI/GenAI experience is confined to the last two months of his current role — nowhere near the 8+ years of production AI solutions required

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and RAG/vector DB skills
MCP and agentic workflow work at Stripe
